title: Male lips. How do I create the perfect lips for a man？ | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: Male lips. How do I create the perfect lips for a man？ ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: How do i create the perfect lips for a male client first of all we don't treat anybody as a member of a certain class they're all individuals and you need to figure out what it is that they actually want [Music] so some men will want to look more feminine and other men will just …

segments.text: how do i create the perfect lips for a male client first of all we don't treat anybody as a member of a certain class they're all individuals and you need to figure out what it is that they actually want [Music] so some men will want to look more feminine and other men will just want to look kind of more beautiful as a man but they want a masculine look so it's important to try and understand what they are looking for in particular and to build in their little kind of niche requirements so some people will notice one aspect of a lip which they want and you need to draw that out in the consultation first so like any treatment it starts with understanding the individual and then you try and create a treatment plan around creating that difference for your particular patient so the real question is what does a masculine lip look like now if you look at hundreds of pictures of good looking men if you just google good looking men what you'll probably notice is the vast majority of them their lips are actually not a primary feature they are relatively small and broader than women's lips

women's lips and that's because just like women's lips they fit in with the general profile of a man's face so if you look at the lower lip angle for example it'll be slightly wider on men because their chins are wider and that normally lines up there's normally a line that runs down the philtrum across the lower lip angle and the top of your cupid's bow and then meets the angle on the chin and this is slightly wider if you have a wider chin so you're designing the treatment to fit the male face which tends to be a slightly broader lips slightly more separate in the middle so the middle section being slightly wider and actually relatively small compared with the rest of the face in certainly in the caucasian face so all that once again brings you back to what are you treating and who is the person in front of you what is their genetic background what are the proportions that will just that will generally fit them but as a general rule men's lips are smaller so less full and slightly wider in proportion but you need to talk to your client and find out exactly what they want because that may not be what they're after so hope that helps
